content: What files are in this repo?
What files are in this repo?

Let me get a cleaner view of the project structure, excluding dependencies.
This is **Kody-ADE-Engine** — a software development engine/agent built in TypeScript. Here's the structure:

## Root Files
- `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `tsup.config.ts` — project config
- `kody.config.json`, `kody.config.schema.json` — Kody configuration
- `README.md`, `ONBOARDING.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `LICENSE` — docs

## Key Directories
| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `src/` | Main source code (~40 files) |
| `src/bin/` | CLI entrypoints and commands (brain, graph, init, serve, etc.) |
| `src/cli/` | CLI utilities (LiteLLM, task state, test-model) |
| `src/commands/` | Core commands (ask, compose, decompose) |
| `src/stages/` | Agent stages (agent, gate, review, ship, verify) |
| `src/memory/` | Memory/graph storage for episodes |
| `src/pipeline/` | Pipeline execution and hooks |
| `src/watch/` | Watch mode with plugin system |
| `src/event-system/` | Event hooks and emitters |
| `src/ci/` | CI parsing utilities |
| `.github/workflows/` | CI/CD pipelines |
| `docs/`, `prompts/`, `plans/`, `tests/` | Documentation, prompts, plans, tests |
| `scripts/`, `templates/`, `assets/` | Utility scripts and assets |

## Notable Source Files
- `src/entry.ts` — main entry point
- `src/context.ts`, `src/config.ts` — core context/config
- `src/observer.ts`, `src/logger.ts` — observability
- `src/dev-server.ts` — dev server
- `src/worktree.ts` — git worktree support
- `src/validators.ts`, `src/resolve.ts` — validation/resolution
